name: Agent 4 — Adversarial Review Agent
prerequisite: RAG pipeline + Agent 3 (Deep Evaluation) already integrated per docs/plans/rag-evaluation-pipeline-design.md

api_contracts.GET /discovery/search: Same EvaluatedSearchResponse; evaluations[] may include nested adversarial

assumptions: Hybrid single Weaviate query + client-side rerank into claim vs framing buckets
Gemini same stack as Agent 3 (Vertex, google-genai)
Graceful degradation: adversarial=None preserves Agent 3 output

tasks.title: Pydantic schemas — AdversarialFlag, AdversarialReviewResult; extend EvaluationResult
tasks.acceptance: Models validate; OpenAPI reflects nested adversarial on evaluation

tasks.title: adversarial_retrieval.py — hybrid query text + bucket_chunks_for_adversarial heuristics
tasks.acceptance: Returns two capped text blocks from Weaviate chunk dicts; snippet fallback documented

tasks.title: adversarial_agent.py — Gemini JSON-only adversarial_review_resource + retry
tasks.acceptance: Parses to AdversarialReviewResult | None; mirrors evaluate_resource error handling

tasks.title: discovery/service.py — Step 6 parallel adversarial after Agent 3
tasks.acceptance: Each EvaluationResult gets adversarial when pipeline succeeds; timeouts/degrade per design §5

tasks.title: Regenerate OpenAPI + apps/web gen:api
tasks.acceptance: Types include adversarial fields on evaluation

tasks.title: UI — show verdict, flags, score adjustments on evaluated resources
tasks.acceptance: Teacher can see adversarial output for top evaluated cards (minimal viable display)

tasks.title: QA review — security, performance, a11y spot-check on new surfaces
tasks.acceptance: No CRITICAL issues; findings logged in memory or issue list
